esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-cockroachdb.otel-default*
| WHERE service.name == "cockroachdb"
  AND ranges_unavailable IS NOT NULL
  AND ranges_unavailable > 0
// Store-level metric: both node_id and store must be present
| WHERE attributes.node_id IS NOT NULL AND attributes.store IS NOT NULL
| STATS unavailable = MAX(ranges_unavailable) BY attributes.node_id, attributes.store, host.name
| SORT unavailable DESC
